message:
refactor(runtime_compat): add spawn_blocking abstraction for dual-runtime support

Adds a new `spawn_blocking<T, F>()` async function to the runtime_compat
module that dispatches blocking work to the correct executor depending on
the active runtime feature flag:

- `asupersync-runtime`: delegates to `asupersync::runtime::spawn_blocking`
- default (tokio): delegates to `tokio::task::spawn_blocking`

Both paths return `Result<T, String>` so callers no longer need to write
duplicate `#[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")]` / `#[cfg(not(...))]`
blocks at each spawn_blocking callsite. This is the foundation for the
subsequent migration of orphan_reaper, session_retention, watchdog, and
storage to the unified API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
